paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 24 — we need to reverse this today. 28 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board.

238 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **89 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 14 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$101,587 in payments going out this week** across 35 tasks — make sure funds are available. No client payments expected this week — all outflow. Heavy week ahead for Katie Holmes & Sean Springs and Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) — make sure resources are lined up.
